name: AVIC Shenyang Aircraft Company Limited
summary: AVIC Shenyang Aircraft Company Limited manufactures aviation products in China. It offers military and civil aviation products; and engineering machinery spring products, as well as provides aviation maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Zhonghangheibao Co.,Ltd. AVIC Shenyang Aircraft Company Limited is based in Shenyang, China. AVIC Shenyang Aircraft Company Limited operates as a subsidiary of Aviation Industry Corporation of China,Ltd..
